picks.title: SJSU Opera Theatre presents a Double Bill: La Voix Humaine and Stuck Elevator at Hammer Theatre Center
picks.why: A quirky sung-through opera about a trapped delivery driver—genuinely bizarre and worth experiencing live.

picks.title: San Francisco Shakespeare Festival Presents Julius Caesar
picks.why: Shakespeare's Julius Caesar performed outdoors by professionals—rare cultural event, free, and timeless drama.

picks.title: Tiny Room Poetry Series with Saul Williams, Derrick Sanderlin & Ramona Webb — San Jose Jazz
picks.why: National poet Saul Williams performs live poetry in an intimate venue—unique artist, unlikely to return soon.
